zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD整体呈震荡偏强格局，价格围绕6.55附近整理，短线多头仍占优势，但上行动能趋缓。结构仍待突破确认为主

技术指标方面，MACD维持轻微正值，短期动能仍偏多；价格站稳20日均线6.434附近，均线系统开始拐头向上结构改善明显

下方支撑关注6.512低点及6.43区域，上方阻力在6.555历史高附近，突破需量能配合。短线以区间交易为主策略为宜谨慎追高

操作上建议逢低布局为主，回踩6.51-6.43分批吸纳；若放量突破6.555，可顺势跟进但需设止损。控制仓位与风险纪律执行

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently trading in a tight consolidation around 6.55, showing mild upward bias after stabilizing above the 20-period SMA at 6.434. Price action remains compressed between 6.512 and 6.555, indicating low volatility and equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The broader short-term structure leans slightly bullish, as the market holds near intraday highs rather than reverting toward the mid-range.

Momentum signals are modestly constructive. The MACD reading at 0.04999 suggests positive momentum is present, though not strongly expanding. With RSI unavailable, confirmation relies more heavily on price behavior and moving averages. The fact that price remains above the SMA(20) suggests short-term trend support is intact, but the lack of strong directional expansion implies buyers are not yet in full control.

Immediate support is found at 6.512, marking the recent swing low, followed by stronger structural support at the SMA(20) near 6.43. A break below this zone would weaken the bullish case and expose downside toward 6.35. On the upside, resistance sits at 6.555, with a clean breakout potentially opening a path toward 6.62–6.65, where prior supply may emerge.

From a trading perspective, the market favors range strategies until a breakout confirms direction. Long positions are better aligned near support around 6.43–6.51 with tight risk control below 6.40. Alternatively, breakout traders may wait for a sustained move above 6.56 to confirm momentum continuation. Until then, expect choppy, low-volatility price behavior with limited directional conviction.
